title: Lepigonum fallax
taxonomy: Lepigonum fallax is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is native to Australia. Lepigonum fallax is part of the genus Lepigonum. The classification of Lepigonum fallax includes its kingdom as Plantae. intro: Lepigonum fallax, also known as Lepigonum, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus and related plants. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the relief of respiratory issues and skin conditions.
